text.title: Input Validation Security Tests
text.summary: Tests for email/password validation, file upload restrictions, path traversal prevention, and rate limiting.

rule.statement: Assert the presence of required security headers: `X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff`, `X-Frame-Options`, and `Strict-Transport-Security`.
rule.rationale: Missing security headers enable MIME sniffing attacks, clickjacking, and downgrade attacks. These are cheap to set and easy to test; omitting the test allows them to disappear silently.

example.code: def test_security_headers_present(client): response = client.get("/") assert response.headers.get("X-Content-Type-Options") == "nosniff" assert "X-Frame-Options" in response.headers assert "Strict-Transport-Security" in response.headers
